title: Wolves in Southeast Alaska Face Pressures From All Sides
summary: As a debate rages over wolves or deer in southeast Alaska, the wolves face pressure from hunters and habitat loss. The post Wolves in Southeast Alaska Face Pressures From All Sides appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Filing Period for Assembly and School Board Seats Closes Monday, July 25, 2022
summary: The filing period for the City & Borough of Juneau Assembly and Board of Education (School Board) opened on Friday, July 15, 2022 at 8:00 a.m. and will close at 4:30p.m. on Monday, July 25, 2022. Visit our website for a list of certified candidates at https://juneau.org/clerk/clerk-certified-municip...
